event: FDUSD (First Digital USD) confidence-run depeg 2025-04-02 — major fiat-backed stablecoin fell to ~0.87 on a public insolvency allegation against the issuer, recovered to ~0.99 next day; backing contested but NEVER impaired on-chain (supply flat +0.57% over 2 days). Price DEPEG is the only true signal; supply/backing detectors must stay silent.
source: DailyHodl, Decrypt, Cointelegraph, BeInCrypto, NFTevening, MoneyTransmitterLaw, TronWeekly — see EVENT.md; on-chain Alchemy archive blocks 22181387 (depeg) / 22166759 (pre-event)

cases.note: At the ~0.87 trough (a ~13% depeg, far past the 10-bps stable band), an FDUSD/USDC isolated collateral loan with LT 0.91 priced by a market-price FDUSD/USD oracle is BELOW the LT line → looped/leveraged positions liquidate now → DEPEG must fire CRITICAL on the lending edge (parity with the ezETH/USD0++ market-price-oracle CRITICAL cases). Simultaneously, supply/unbacked/mint-burn detectors MUST stay silent: this was a confidence run on a CONTESTED-but-intact reserve, supply moved only +0.57% over 2 days, and there was no anomalous mint — the monitor must not fabricate a backing failure from a price dislocation plus a tweet.

Recovery leg: at ~0.93 the price is back ABOVE the 0.91 LT but still ~7% off peg — well outside the tight stable band, so a DEPEG must persist but DE-ESCALATE (no longer below LT → not CRITICAL; on a no-liq-path DEX edge it is WARN). This anchors that the engine de-escalates as a stablecoin recovers rather than latching the trough severity. Both edges are asserted at a WARN floor here: at 0.93 the lending edge is above its 0.91 LT so it de-escalates from the trough's CRITICAL to WARN, and the DEX edge (no liq path) is WARN. Declaring both keeps the closed case complete (no edge's correct DEPEG lands in unclassified→FP).

FP-trap: by the morning of Apr 3 FDUSD is effectively back at peg (~0.9996, within ~4 bps). A healthy fiat-backed stablecoin sits a hair off $1 continuously; the engine must NOT keep alarming once the run is over, and must not hair-trigger a DEPEG on a sub-10-bps wobble. No DEPEG ≥ WARN; no supply/backing alert. The only emitted signal at this snapshot is a sub-budget NEW_MARKET INFO (the modeled market has no prior baseline), which is below the WARN severity_budget and therefore not an alert — max_emitted WARN/0 enforces zero WARN+ noise.
